note: Floor for .github/workflows/test-count-floor.yml. The number is the SUM of passing tests across the two jest configs (test:node + test:browser); a drop in either env trips the check. Almost every spec runs in both, so a single deleted spec drops this by 2. Only the maintainer (@hans-crypto) is authorised to lower this number; every other change that reduces test count is treated as an accident and rejected. To raise the floor after legitimately adding tests, bump this value and commit. See also workspace CLAUDE.md, HARD RULE 'Never delete a passing test without explicit permission'.
